title: Media Search Engine
points: Utilizing Gemini as a Vision-Language Model (VLM) for intelligent information extraction.
Architecting the data layer with MongoDB for raw information storage and ChromaDB for semantic vector storage and retrieval.

roles.title: Graduate AI Engineering Intern
points: Achieved a 50x runtime reduction in cancer-target discovery by implementing PyTorch-GPU vectorization and re-engineering data augmentation logic.
Tripled feature deployment throughput on HPC clusters by architecting a config-driven SLURM orchestration tool for interactive GPU sessions.
Orchestrated Generative AI deployment (BoltzGen) on AWS EC2 using DL AMIs for stable protein binder inference.
90% reduction in deck-creation time (2 hrs to 10 mins) through a custom interactive visualization system with persistent dashboards.

roles.title: AI Engineer (Full Time)
points: Secured a new client by engineering a real-time CV/clustering anomaly detection pipeline for pollution monitoring.
Achieved 90% recall and 80% precision in content moderation using a DP-inspired temporal smoothing algorithm; parallelized it with Celery for distributed queuing.
Enabled lag-free ad placement at 30+ FPS with stream-agnostic inference logic; boosted object tracking throughput by 20x via batching.
Achieved 78.1% mAP on industrial defect segmentation; outperformed task-specific baselines on unseen data using a curated 30k-image dataset.

roles.title: Student and Intern (Deep Learning and Computer Vision)
points: Secured an A+ grade in a rigorous Deep Learning boot-camp at the National University of Singapore.
Guided a six-person team in developing helmet, vest detection models to ensure construction worker safety and attained an accuracy of 65% despite resource constraints in under a week.

roles.title: AI Intern (Research & Development)
points: Led R&D for 5 peers on frame-rate conversion; exceeded speed and quality KPIs by 1.5x.
27.9 PSNR achieved on 448x256 video sequences; managed research milestones and senior technical presentations.

title: LazyResume: OCR & LLM Document Parsing
points: Engineered a pipeline using Vision-based OCR and LLMs; designed to bridge the recruiter-candidate gap by automating unstructured data parsing into structured JSON.
Improved parseability of complex layouts by 20% via custom evaluation hooks for resume-to-JD alignment.

title: Fuzzy Hybrid Model for Stock Trading
points: Applied domain-based optimization to standard stock trading models, tailoring feature extraction to financial market indicators.
Reduced feature dimensionality by 5x while improving model performance by approximately 20%.
Optimized data pipelines to improve loading and training speed by 10x.

roles.title: Master of Science in Artificial Intelligence
roles.description: CGPA: 3.89. Specialization in deep learning and AI systems.
roles.subtitle: Academic Projects & Coursework
points: Computer Vision: Image processing (contrast stretching), depth estimation, 3D reconstruction, segmentation, and super-resolution.
Deep Learning: Regression, classification, and MLOps for hyperparameter tuning.
Natural Language Processing: Sentiment classification and Seq2Seq models for English-French translation.
Advanced ML: Time series analysis and prediction, reinforcement learning, and fuzzy hybrid models.

roles.title: B.Tech in Computer Science (Specialization in AI/ML)

roles.subtitle: Academic Projects & Coursework
points: Executed multiple projects spanning app development (React Native), web development (React), networks, and cybersecurity basics.

roles.title: Thesis: Speech Recognition using Reconstructed Phase Spaces
roles.description: Transformed audio signals into 3D phase space representations and applied deep learning for enhanced accuracy.
